terminal.description: Exploring technical expertise across cloud, development, and DevOps domains

expertise.title: Technical Expertise
expertise.subtitle: Comprehensive skill set spanning cloud infrastructure, development, and DevOps practices

explorer.title: Interactive Skill Explorer
explorer.subtitle: Use terminal commands to explore my skills in detail
explorer.ready: Skills Explorer ready. Type 'help' to list commands, or 'man <command>' for details.

help: help                Show this list of commands
man <command>       Show detailed manual for a command
ls [category]       List skills in a category (or list categories)
cat <skill>         Show details for a specific skill
top [n]             Show top N skills by proficiency (default: 5)
find <keyword>      Search skills by name or category
tree                Show category tree of all skills
levels              Show the proficiency level scale
echo <text>         Print text back to the terminal
man tree            Read the manual for tree
levels: Intermediate (40-69%)  Practical experience on real tasks
Advanced     (70-89%)  Production usage, can mentor others

whoami.tip: Tip: run "contact" for details, "stats" for a skill summary.

output.lsTip: Tip: run "ls <category>" to list its skills.
output.catTip: Tip: run "tree" or "ls" to discover skill names.
output.findTip: Tip: run "find {{name}}" to search by substring.
output.findDesc: Searches skills by name or category (case-insensitive).
output.historyEmpty: No history yet — start typing commands.
